title: lathyrus hookeri var. trichocalyx
intro: Lathyrus hookeri var. trichocalyx is a variety of the Lathyrus hookeri plant, commonly known as the Himalayan pea, which is a perennial legume native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which contain a toxin called ODAP, however, the seeds also have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus hookeri var. trichocalyx include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, but its use should be approached with caution due to the potential toxicity of its seeds.
